docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,423.68 FILED BY PARK, JENNY AS TO DEFENDANT ISLAS-ALBARRAN, JEANETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2013 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2013 - JUDGMENT.
